channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 40,000 — Core House For In Glen Norah (Glen Norah, Harare High Density)
item.description: USD 40,000 — Glen Norah, Harare High Density. 2 beds, 1 bath. Core House For In Glen Norah. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
